review_body_text: I like to work at Cimb because as a customer service executive at preferred call center its teachs me to be patience, active listening, responsible and empathy.
cons_text: Short break. Finish work a wee hours eg 12am and shift

review_body_text: Working with the company are very simple and everyday goes by with good. What i learned from the company are the marketing skills and how to communicate with people. The management are good and the culture there also good. The hardest part is when we have to go outside and meet the customer very far away from the office and i am very enjoyed working with the company meeting with cool and supportive co-workers.

review_title: Tired and need to extra working hours
review_body_text: Need to stayback without allowance. Saturday also working day without allowance. Dont have life balance. Am not enjoy with the environment. The manager didnt appreciate staff.
Everyday work Working with senior and manage branch Good management team Fun and enjoy work place Difficult to get leave on weekend Great opportunity to join one of a largest bank in malaysia

review_title: A boring workplace with repeating routine tasks
review_body_text: Lack of planning in providing training to newbies. Senior staffs are not willing to teach junior staffs. Boring workplace and would not work again for this company.
Nice working environment, much more benefit like free vacation with ticket and hotel. So much free gift from the company, gathering like lunch and dining.
This is my job experiens with marketing, It's a big experiens in my life knowing bisness and stock market for invesment. Very establish company and have the best product for people.

Morning spirit required the workers play some fun games in order to make the employee start the job with smile and happy.The games would take 5-10 minutes to complete the games. The games will held 3 times per week which is one of the employee need create the games for the morning spirit. I believe a productive work would be achieve when the employee is in good mood.
Good staff and good environment. Easy to ask somethings if don't know how to do the job given. All the staff is friendly, good character. The staff also take care of each other

Typical day at work are i have doing sales for 11am until 10pm. Learned : A tips of how to attract customer to apply with our products. Management : Working hours from 11am until 10pm Workplace culture : Positive and harmony Hardest part of the job : When in a daily no one want to apply with me. Most enjoyable part of the job : Sales Manager sporting and cheerful.

Everyday need to do sales and marketing Knowledge of the product with skills of sales very important to sales people Part of the staff not given full cooperation so it hard to me to do sales and to close deal

CIMB bank has given a platform for me to learn and experience customer service job once finished my studies.. The reason I want to leave this job because it is already more than 4 years working in this company.. It is a right time for me to find and learn new skills to enhance my career..

• To Specialize and enhance my skills in Java and J2EE related technologies • To work in a challenging and rewarding work environment and contribute to the best of my ability, significantly to the growth of a progressive company • 7 Years of experience in Java and J2EE Technologies • Excellent development skills using J2SE, J2EE, SPRING, STRUTS, SERVLET, JSP, Restful Web Services, Ionic Frame Work, My SQL, Microsoft SQL, Postgres SQL and Oracle. • Extensive Object Oriented Development (OOP/OOD) experience • Good working knowledge on application development and maintenance life cycle process

review_title: Productive to serving the customer and assisting them on any inquiry
review_body_text: The job area are most on serving the customer and helping them to decide the best product which they can get from the bank. From this job, I have sharpen my negotiation and selling skills especially selling the insurance product and helping customer to choose the best credit card suits to their own needs.

review_title: A good training ground for learning new skills as CIMB is one of the leading banks in innovating financial products.
review_body_text: A fun place to work at should you enjoy a fast paced work environment and are able to multitask at all times. Since financial products are evolving the readiness to perform the work in the absence of automation is inevitable, however, the challenges faced at work is the most enjoyable part of the job as you are given a full hand to take the lead to handle and complete the job within the given timeline with 101% accuracy.
cons_text: Long working hours at peak months

review_body_text: Good team work and good environment workplace Do the work under pressure,unless if have are problem must discuss or follow up with client or executive.

review_title: It is productive and fun working at CIMB
review_body_text: CIMB is an innovative bank and is one of the largest bank in Malaysia. The company cares for both their clients and staff, that balance attracted many people to join and invest with them.
pros_text: Flexible hours, good pay, and provide many self enrichment programs.

review_title: productive and fun culture in CIMB
review_body_text: CIMB is a workplace that help their employees to build their career with fun and productive environment. The hardest part of the job is limitation to access some data in the system as I am a contract staff. The most enjoyable part of the job is having a good friend around us with positive vibes as well as helpful in everything.

This is the company previously known as southern bank and later was bought by Cimb group of companies. After a year of joining the company my unit has changed to i-cimb and I became a permanent officer
pros_text: Free medical card for employee and families

review_body_text: I have started working at cimb bank as a teller. I have learned a lot when I working there since 2007 until I left the bank. The hardest part is I need to make sure that every year, I must achieve my kpi and also help my team to achieve branch kpi as well. The most enjoyable part of the job is I love to meet customer when I have appointed to be at customer service. Every single day when I was at customer service department, I have learn how to handle customer complain, I need to handle all related to customers inquiry regarding the banks product and also I need to open account for new customer. The reason I have left the bank because of I took mss offering by the bank on july 2015.
